userGuidance: 서로 다른 고유 식별자를 가진 모든 사람은 실제로 다른 사람이며 독립적으로 취급되어야 하는 것으로 가정한다.
etlConventions: Any person linkage that needs to occur to uniquely identify Persons ought to be done prior to writing this table. This identifier can be the original id from the source data provided if it is an integer, otherwise it can be an autogenerated number.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 Person의 출생 시 생물학적 성별을 담기 위한 것이다. 이 필드는 성 정체성 문제를 연구하는 데 사용해서는 안 된다.
etlConventions: Use the gender or sex value present in the data under the assumption that it is the biological sex at birth. If the source data captures gender identity it should be stored in the [OBSERVATION](https://ohdsi.github.io/CommonDataModel/cdm531.html#observation) table. [Accepted gender concepts](http://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Gender&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). Please refer to the [THEMIS repository](https://ohdsi.github.io/Themis/tag_gender_concept_id.html) for detailed conventions on how to populate this field.

userGuidance: year_of_birth를 사용하여 나이를 계산한다.
etlConventions: For data sources with date of birth, the year should be extracted. If no year of birth is available all the person's data should be dropped from the CDM instance. For additional information on how to populate this field, please refer to the [THEMIS repository](https://ohdsi.github.io/Themis/tag_year_of_birth.html).

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: For data sources that provide the precise date of birth, the month should be extracted and stored in this field.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: For data sources that provide the precise date of birth, the day should be extracted and stored in this field.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This field is not required but highly encouraged. For data sources that provide the precise datetime of birth, that value should be stored in this field. For more information on how to populate this field, please refer to the [THEMIS repository](https://ohdsi.github.io/Themis/person.html).

userGuidance: 이 필드는 사람의 인종 또는 민족적 배경을 담는다.
etlConventions: Only use this field if you have information about race or ethnic background. The Vocabulary contains Concepts about the main races and ethnic backgrounds in a hierarchical system. Due to the imprecise nature of human races and ethnic backgrounds, this is not a perfect system. Mixed races are not supported. If a clear race or ethnic background cannot be established, use Concept_Id 0. [Accepted Race Concepts](http://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Race&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: 이 필드는 미국 정부의 관리예산처(OMB)에서 정의한 Ethnicity를 담는다. 즉, "Hispanic"과 "Not Hispanic"만 구분한다. 인종 및 민족적 배경은 여기에 저장하지 않는다.
etlConventions: Only use this field if you have US-based data and a source of this information. Do not attempt to infer Ethnicity from the race or ethnic background of the Person. [Accepted ethnicity concepts](http://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Ethnicity&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=)

userGuidance: location은 해당 사람의 실제 주소를 의미한다. 이 필드는 해당 사람의 마지막으로 알려진 위치를 담아야 한다.
etlConventions: Put the location_id from the [LOCATION](https://ohdsi.github.io/CommonDataModel/cdm531.html#location) table here that represents the most granular location information for the person. For additional information on how to populate this field, please refer to the [THEMIS repository](https://ohdsi.github.io/Themis/populate_person_location_id.html).

userGuidance: Provider는 마지막으로 알려진 주치의(General Practitioner)를 의미한다.
etlConventions: Put the provider_id from the [PROVIDER](https://ohdsi.github.io/CommonDataModel/cdm531.html#provider) table of the last known general practitioner of the person. If there are multiple providers, it is up to the ETL to decide which to put here.

userGuidance: Care Site는 해당 Provider가 일반적으로 1차 진료를 제공하는 장소를 의미한다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: 원천 데이터의 사람과 다시 연결하려면 이 필드를 사용한다. 이는 일반적으로 ETL 로직의 오류 검사에 사용된다.
etlConventions: Some use cases require the ability to link back to persons in the source data. This field allows for the storing of the person value as it appears in the source. This field is not required but strongly recommended.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 원천 데이터에서 가져온 사람의 생물학적 성별을 저장하는 데 사용된다. 표준 분석에서의 사용을 의도한 것이 아니라 참조용으로만 사용된다.
etlConventions: Put the assigned sex at birth of the person as it appears in the source data.

userGuidance: 선택지의 수가 적기 때문에 이 값은 0이 되는 경향이 있다.
etlConventions: If the source data codes asigned sex at birth in a non-standard vocabulary, store the concept_id here.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 원천 데이터에서 가져온 사람의 인종을 저장하는 데 사용된다. 표준 분석에서의 사용을 의도한 것이 아니라 참조용으로만 사용된다.
etlConventions: Put the race of the person as it appears in the source data.

userGuidance: 선택지의 수가 적기 때문에 이 값은 0이 되는 경향이 있다.
etlConventions: If the source data codes race in an OMOP supported vocabulary store the concept_id here.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 원천 데이터에서 가져온 사람의 ethnicity를 저장하는 데 사용된다. 표준 분석에서의 사용을 의도한 것이 아니라 참조용으로만 사용된다.
etlConventions: If the person has an ethnicity other than the OMB standard of "Hispanic" or "Not Hispanic" store that value from the source data here.

userGuidance: 선택지의 수가 적기 때문에 이 값은 0이 되는 경향이 있다.
etlConventions: If the source data codes ethnicity in an OMOP supported vocabulary, store the concept_id here.

userGuidance: 한 Person은 Observation_Period_Id로 식별되는 여러 개의 개별 Observation Period를 가질 수 있다.
etlConventions: Assign a unique observation_period_id to each discrete Observation Period for a Person.

userGuidance: Observation Period가 기록되는 대상인 PERSON 레코드의 Person ID이다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: Observation Period의 시작 날짜를 결정하려면 이 날짜를 사용한다.
etlConventions: It is often the case that the idea of Observation Periods does not exist in source data. In those cases, the observation_period_start_date can be inferred as the earliest Event date available for the Person. In insurance claim data, the Observation Period can be considered as the time period the Person is enrolled with a payer. If a Person switches plans but stays with the same payer, and therefore capturing of data continues, that change would be captured in [PAYER_PLAN_PERIOD](https://ohdsi.github.io/CommonDataModel/cdm531.html#payer_plan_period).

userGuidance: 한 Person의 모든 이벤트가 기록되었다고 가정할 수 있는 기간의 종료 날짜를 결정하려면 이 날짜를 사용한다.
etlConventions: It is often the case that the idea of Observation Periods does not exist in source data. In those cases, the observation_period_end_date can be inferred as the last Event date available for the Person. In insurance claim data, the Observation Period can be considered as the time period the Person is enrolled with a payer.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 해당 기간이 보험 가입 파일, EHR 의료 방문 기록, 또는 기타 출처에서 결정되었는지 등 Observation Period의 출처를 판별하는 데 사용할 수 있다.
etlConventions: Choose the observation_period_type_concept_id that best represents how the period was determined. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: 환자와 의료 시스템 간의 고유한 상호작용을 식별하는 데 사용한다. 이 식별자는 다른 CDM 이벤트 테이블 전반에 걸쳐 연결되어 이벤트를 visit과 연관시킨다.
etlConventions: This should be populated by creating a unique identifier for each unique interaction between a person and the healthcare system where the person receives a medical good or service over a span of time.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: 이 필드는 입원 또는 외래와 같은 방문 유형을 나타내는 concept id를 포함한다. 이 필드의 모든 concept는 standard여야 하며 Visit 도메인에 속해야 한다.
etlConventions: Populate this field based on the kind of visit that took place for the person. For example this could be "Inpatient Visit", "Outpatient Visit", "Ambulatory Visit", etc. This table will contain standard concepts in the Visit domain. These concepts are arranged in a hierarchical structure to facilitate cohort definitions by rolling up to generally familiar Visits adopted in most healthcare systems worldwide. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Visit&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: 입원 방문의 경우 시작 날짜는 일반적으로 입원일이다. 외래 방문의 경우 시작 날짜와 종료 날짜가 동일하다.
etlConventions: When populating VISIT_START_DATE, you should think about the patient experience to make decisions on how to define visits. In the case of an inpatient visit this should be the date the patient was admitted to the hospital or institution. In all other cases this should be the date of the patient-provider interaction. If this information is not available the record should be dropped.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If no time is given for the start date of a visit, set it to midnight (00:00:0000).

userGuidance: 입원 방문의 경우 종료 날짜는 일반적으로 퇴원일이다.
etlConventions:
Visit end dates are mandatory. If end dates are not provided in the source there are three ways in which to derive them:
- Outpatient Visit: visit_end_datetime = visit_start_datetime
- Emergency Room Visit: visit_end_datetime = visit_start_datetime
- Inpatient Visit: Usually there is information about discharge. If not, you should be able to derive the end date from the sudden decline of activity or from the absence of inpatient procedures/drugs.
- Non-hospital institution Visits: Particularly for claims data, if end dates are not provided assume the visit is for the duration of month that it occurs.
For Inpatient Visits ongoing at the date of ETL, put date of processing the data into visit_end_datetime and visit_type_concept_id with 32220 "Still patient" to identify the visit as incomplete.
- All other Visits: visit_end_datetime = visit_start_datetime. If this is a one-day visit the end date should match the start date.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If no time is given for the end date of a visit, set it to midnight (00:00:0000).

userGuidance: 이 필드를 사용하여 visit 레코드의 출처, 즉 레코드가 어디에서 왔는지를 파악한다.
etlConventions: Populate this field based on the provenance of the visit record, as in whether it came from an EHR record or billing claim. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: visit 레코드당 provider는 한 명만 존재하며 ETL 문서에는 어떻게 선택되었는지(주치의, 입원담당의 등)를 명확히 기술해야 한다. 소스에 하나의 visit과 연관된 provider가 여러 명 있는 경우, 이는 이벤트 테이블(CONDITION_OCCURRENCE, PROCEDURE_OCCURRENCE 등) 또는 VISIT_DETAIL 테이블에 반영할 수 있다.
etlConventions: If there are multiple providers associated with a visit, you will need to choose which one to put here. The additional providers can be stored in the [VISIT_DETAIL](https://ohdsi.github.io/CommonDataModel/cdm531.html#visit_detail) table.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 Visit이 발생한 Care Site에 대한 정보를 제공한다.
etlConventions: There should only be one Care Site associated with a Visit.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 발생한 방문 유형(입원, 외래, 응급 등)을 나타내는 소스 데이터의 원본 값을 보관한다.
etlConventions: If there is information about the kind of visit in the source data that value should be stored here. If a visit is an amalgamation of visits from the source then use a hierarchy to choose the visit source value, such as IP -> ER-> OP. This should line up with the logic chosen to determine how visits are created.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If the visit source value is coded in the source data using an OMOP supported vocabulary put the concept id representing the source value here.

userGuidance: 이 필드를 사용하여 환자가 어디에서 입원했는지를 판단한다. 이 concept는 visit 도메인의 일부이며, 예를 들어 환자가 장기요양시설에서 병원으로 입원했는지를 나타낼 수 있다.
etlConventions: If available, map the admitting_source_value to a standard concept in the visit domain. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Visit&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). If a person was admitted from home or was self-referred, set this to 0.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This information may be called something different in the source data but the field is meant to contain a value indicating where a person was admitted from. Typically this applies only to visits that have a length of stay, like inpatient visits or long-term care visits.

userGuidance: 이 필드를 사용하여 방문 후 환자가 어디로 퇴원했는지를 판단한다. 이 concept는 visit 도메인의 일부이며, 예를 들어 환자가 집으로 퇴원했는지 또는 장기요양시설로 보내졌는지를 나타낼 수 있다.
etlConventions: If available, map the discharge_to_source_value to a standard concept in the visit domain. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Visit&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This information may be called something different in the source data but the field is meant to contain a value indicating where a person was discharged to after a visit, as in they went home or were moved to long-term care. Typically this applies only to visits that have a length of stay of a day or more.

userGuidance: 이 필드를 사용하여 해당 환자의 특정 visit 이전에 발생한 visit을 찾는다. 그 사이에는 며칠에서 몇 년의 간격이 있을 수 있다.
etlConventions: This field can be used to link a visit immediately preceding the current visit. Note this is not symmetrical, and there is no such thing as a "following_visit_id".

userGuidance: 환자와 의료 시스템 간의 고유한 상호작용을 식별하는 데 사용한다. 이 식별자는 다른 CDM 이벤트 테이블 전반에 걸쳐 연결되어 이벤트를 visit detail과 연관시킨다.
etlConventions: This should be populated by creating a unique identifier for each unique interaction between a person and the healthcare system where the person receives a medical good or service over a span of time.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: 이 필드는 입원 또는 외래와 같은 visit detail 유형을 나타내는 concept id를 포함한다. 이 필드의 모든 concept는 standard여야 하며 Visit 도메인에 속해야 한다.
etlConventions: Populate this field based on the kind of visit that took place for the person. For example this could be "Inpatient Visit", "Outpatient Visit", "Ambulatory Visit", etc. This table will contain standard concepts in the Visit domain. These concepts are arranged in a hierarchical structure to facilitate cohort definitions by rolling up to generally familiar Visits adopted in most healthcare systems worldwide. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Visit&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: 이는 진료 시작 날짜이다. 이는 Visit Detail이 연관된 Visit의 날짜와 같을 수도 있고 다를 수도 있다.
etlConventions: When populating VISIT_DETAIL_START_DATE, you should think about the patient experience to make decisions on how to define visits. Most likely this should be the date of the patient-provider interaction.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If no time is given for the start date of a visit, set it to midnight (00:00:0000).

userGuidance: 이는 환자-provider 상호작용의 종료 날짜이다.
etlConventions:
Visit Detail end dates are mandatory. If end dates are not provided in the source there are three ways in which to derive them:
- Outpatient Visit Detail: visit_detail_end_datetime = visit_detail_start_datetime - Emergency Room Visit Detail: visit_detail_end_datetime = visit_detail_start_datetime - Inpatient Visit Detail: Usually there is information about discharge. If not, you should be able to derive the end date from the sudden decline of activity or from the absence of inpatient procedures/drugs. - Non-hospital institution Visit Details: Particularly for claims data, if end dates are not provided assume the visit is for the duration of month that it occurs.
For Inpatient Visit Details ongoing at the date of ETL, put date of processing the data into visit_detai_end_datetime and visit_detail_type_concept_id with 32220 "Still patient" to identify the visit as incomplete. All other Visits Details: visit_detail_end_datetime = visit_detail_start_datetime.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If no time is given for the end date of a visit, set it to midnight (00:00:0000).

userGuidance: 이 필드를 사용하여 visit detail 레코드의 출처, 즉 레코드가 어디에서 왔는지를 파악한다.
etlConventions: Populate this field based on the provenance of the visit detail record, as in whether it came from an EHR record or billing claim. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: **visit** 레코드당 provider는 한 명만 존재하며 ETL 문서에는 어떻게 선택되었는지(주치의, 입원담당의 등)를 명확히 기술해야 한다. 이는 VISIT_DETAIL 테이블을 활용하는 전형적인 이유인데, 각 VISIT_DETAIL 레코드는 provider를 한 명만 가질 수 있지만 하나의 VISIT_OCCURRENCE 레코드와 연관될 수 있는 VISIT_DETAIL 레코드의 수에는 제한이 없기 때문이다.
etlConventions: The additional providers associated to a Visit can be stored in this table where each VISIT_DETAIL record represents a different provider.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 Visit Detail이 발생한 Care Site에 대한 정보를 제공한다.
etlConventions: There should only be one Care Site associated with a Visit Detail.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 발생한 visit detail 유형(입원, 외래, 응급 등)을 나타내는 소스 데이터의 원본 값을 보관한다.
etlConventions: If there is information about the kind of visit detail in the source data that value should be stored here. If a visit is an amalgamation of visits from the source then use a hierarchy to choose the VISIT_DETAIL_SOURCE_VALUE, such as IP -> ER-> OP. This should line up with the logic chosen to determine how visits are created.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If the VISIT_DETAIL_SOURCE_VALUE is coded in the source data using an OMOP supported vocabulary put the concept id representing the source value here.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This information may be called something different in the source data but the field is meant to contain a value indicating where a person was admitted from. Typically this applies only to visits that have a length of stay, like inpatient visits or long-term care visits.

userGuidance: 이 필드를 사용하여 환자가 어디에서 입원했는지를 판단한다. 이 concept는 visit 도메인의 일부이며, 예를 들어 환자가 장기요양시설에서 병원으로 입원했는지를 나타낼 수 있다.
etlConventions: If available, map the admitting_source_value to a standard concept in the visit domain. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Visit&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). If a person was admitted from home or was self-referred, set this to 0.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This information may be called something different in the source data but the field is meant to contain a value indicating where a person was discharged to after a visit, as in they went home or were moved to long-term care. Typically this applies only to visits that have a length of stay of a day or more.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 visit detail 레코드 이후 환자가 어디로 퇴원했는지를 판단하는 데 사용한다. 이 concept은 visit 도메인의 일부이며, 예를 들어 환자가 자택으로 퇴원했는지 또는 장기요양시설로 이송되었는지를 나타낼 수 있다.
etlConventions: If available, map the DISCHARGE_TO_SOURCE_VALUE to a Standard Concept in the Visit domain. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Visit&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: 이 필드는 해당 visit detail 레코드 이전에 그 사람에게 발생한 visit detail을 찾는 데 사용한다. 그 사이에는 며칠 또는 몇 년의 간격이 있을 수 있다.
etlConventions: The PRECEDING_VISIT_DETAIL_ID can be used to link a visit immediately preceding the current Visit Detail. Note this is not symmetrical, and there is no such thing as a "following_visit_id".

userGuidance: 이 필드는 해당 visit detail 레코드를 포함하는 상위 visit detail을 찾는 데 사용한다. 이는 visit detail 레코드가 VISIT_OCCURRENCE/VISIT_DETAIL 관계를 넘어 중첩되어야 하는 경우에 사용한다.
etlConventions: If there are multiple nested levels to how Visits are represented in the source, the VISIT_DETAIL_PARENT_ID can be used to record this relationship.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 VISIT_DETAIL 레코드를 해당 VISIT_OCCURRENCE에 연결하는 데 사용한다.
etlConventions: Put the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID that subsumes the VISIT_DETAIL record here.

userGuidance: 한 사람의 condition 레코드에 부여되는 고유 키이다. 동일한 visit 중 중복된 condition을 어떻게 처리했는지는 ETL을 참조한다.
etlConventions: Each instance of a condition present in the source data should be assigned this unique key. In some cases, a person can have multiple records of the same condition within the same visit. It is valid to keep these duplicates and assign them individual, unique, CONDITION_OCCURRENCE_IDs, though it is up to the ETL how they should be handled.

userGuidance: condition이 기록된 PERSON의 PERSON_ID이다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: CONDITION_CONCEPT_ID 필드는 분석에 우선적으로 사용하는 것이 권장되며, 네트워크 연구에는 반드시 사용해야 한다. 이는 condition을 나타내는 source value로부터 매핑된 standard concept이다.
etlConventions: The CONCEPT_ID that the CONDITION_SOURCE_VALUE maps to. Only records whose source values map to concepts with a domain of "Condition" should go in this table. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Condition&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: 이 날짜는 condition의 시작일을 판단하는 데 사용한다.
etlConventions: Most often data sources do not have the idea of a start date for a condition. Rather, if a source only has one date associated with a condition record it is acceptable to use that date for both the CONDITION_START_DATE and the CONDITION_END_DATE.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If a source does not specify datetime the convention is to set the time to midnight (00:00:0000)

userGuidance: 이 날짜는 condition의 종료일을 판단하는 데 사용한다.
etlConventions: Most often data sources do not have the idea of a start date for a condition. Rather, if a source only has one date associated with a condition record it is acceptable to use that date for both the CONDITION_START_DATE and the CONDITION_END_DATE.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If a source does not specify datetime the convention is to set the time to midnight (00:00:0000)

userGuidance: 이 필드는 condition 레코드의 출처를 판단하는 데 사용할 수 있다. 즉, 해당 condition이 EHR 시스템, 보험 청구, 레지스트리 또는 기타 출처에서 비롯되었는지를 나타낸다.
etlConventions: Choose the CONDITION_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID that best represents the provenance of the record. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: 이 concept은 visit 중 진단이 내려진 시점(입원 진단, 최종 진단), 검사 소견에 따라 진단이 결정되었는지, 진단이 배제 진단이었는지, 또는 예비 진단이었는지 등을 나타낸다.
etlConventions: Choose the Concept in the Condition Status domain that best represents the point during the visit when the diagnosis was given. These can include admitting diagnosis, principal diagnosis, and secondary diagnosis. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Condition+Status&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: Stop Reason은 source 데이터 내 목적과 관련하여 Condition이 더 이상 유효하지 않은 이유를 나타낸다. Stop Reason이 반드시 해당 condition이 더 이상 발생하지 않음을 의미하는 것은 아님에 유의한다.
etlConventions: This information is often not populated in source data and it is a valid etl choice to leave it blank if the information does not exist.

userGuidance: condition 레코드와 연관된 provider, 예를 들어 진단을 내린 provider 또는 증상을 기록한 provider이다.
etlConventions: The ETL may need to make a choice as to which PROVIDER_ID to put here. Based on what is available this may or may not be different than the provider associated with the overall VISIT_OCCURRENCE record, for example the admitting vs attending physician on an EHR record.

userGuidance: condition이 발생한 visit이다.
etlConventions: Depending on the structure of the source data, this may have to be determined based on dates. If a CONDITION_START_DATE occurs within the start and end date of a Visit it is a valid ETL choice to choose the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID from the Visit that subsumes it, even if not explicitly stated in the data. While not required, an attempt should be made to locate the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID of the CONDITION_OCCURRENCE record.

userGuidance: condition이 발생한 VISIT_DETAIL 레코드이다. 예를 들어, 진단 시점에 그 사람이 ICU에 있었다면 VISIT_OCCURRENCE 레코드는 전체 입원 기간을 반영하고 VISIT_DETAIL 레코드는 그 입원 visit 중 ICU 체류를 반영한다.
etlConventions: Same rules apply as for the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 발생한 condition을 나타내는 source 데이터의 원래 값을 그대로 담는다. 예를 들어 ICD10 또는 Read 코드일 수 있다.
etlConventions: This code is mapped to a Standard Condition Concept in the Standardized Vocabularies and the original code is stored here for reference.

userGuidance: 이는 condition source value를 나타내는 concept이며, 반드시 standard일 필요는 없다. 이 필드는 OHDSI 커뮤니티 전반에서 사용되는 Standard Concept을 포함하도록 요구되지 않으므로 분석에서의 사용은 권장되지 않으며, 특정 분석 활용 사례에 필요한 Condition의 source 상세 정보를 Standard Concept이 적절히 나타내지 못하는 경우에만 사용해야 한다. 네트워크 전반에서 일관성 있는 표준화된 분석을 가능하게 하려면 대신 CONDITION_CONCEPT_ID 사용을 고려한다.
etlConventions: If the CONDITION_SOURCE_VALUE is coded in the source data using an OMOP supported vocabulary put the concept id representing the source value here.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 condition 상태를 나타내는 source 데이터의 원래 값을 그대로 담는다.
etlConventions: This information may be called something different in the source data but the field is meant to contain a value indicating when and how a diagnosis was given to a patient. This source value is mapped to a standard concept which is stored in the CONDITION_STATUS_CONCEPT_ID field.

userGuidance: 한 사람의 약물 조제 또는 투여 레코드에 부여되는 고유 키이다. 동일한 visit 중 중복된 약물을 어떻게 처리했는지는 ETL을 참조한다.
etlConventions: Each instance of a drug dispensing or administration present in the source data should be assigned this unique key. In some cases, a person can have multiple records of the same drug within the same visit. It is valid to keep these duplicates and assign them individual, unique, DRUG_EXPOSURE_IDs, though it is up to the ETL how they should be handled.

userGuidance: 약물 조제 또는 투여가 기록된 PERSON의 PERSON_ID이다. 이는 시스템에서 생성된 코드일 수 있다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: DRUG_CONCEPT_ID 필드는 분석에서 우선적으로 사용하도록 권장되며, 네트워크 연구에서는 반드시 사용해야 한다. 이는 약물 제품 또는 그 밖의 방식으로 체내에 투입된 분자를 나타내는 source concept id로부터 매핑된 표준 개념이다. drug 개념은 약물 강도(strength) 및 용량(dose)에 대한 정보를 다양한 수준으로 포함할 수 있다. 이 정보는 후속 필드의 수량 및 투여 정보와, 표준 vocabulary 다운로드의 일부로 제공되는 DRUG_STRENGTH 테이블의 강도 정보의 맥락에서 관련이 있다.
etlConventions: The CONCEPT_ID that the DRUG_SOURCE_VALUE maps to. The concept id should be derived either from mapping from the source concept id or by picking the drug concept representing the most amount of detail you have. Records whose source values map to standard concepts with a domain of Drug should go in this table. When the Drug Source Value of the code cannot be translated into Standard Drug Concept IDs, a Drug exposure entry is stored with only the corresponding SOURCE_CONCEPT_ID and DRUG_SOURCE_VALUE and a DRUG_CONCEPT_ID of 0. The Drug Concept with the most detailed content of information is preferred during the mapping process. These are indicated in the CONCEPT_CLASS_ID field of the Concept and are recorded in the following order of precedence: ÒMarketed ProductÓ, ÒBranded PackÓ, ÒClinical PackÓ, ÒBranded DrugÓ, ÒClinical DrugÓ, ÒBranded Drug ComponentÓ, ÒClinical Drug ComponentÓ, ÒBranded Drug FormÓ, ÒClinical Drug FormÓ, and only if no other information is available ÒIngredientÓ. Note: If only the drug class is known, the DRUG_CONCEPT_ID field should contain 0. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Drug&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: 이 날짜를 사용하여 약물 기록의 시작일을 판단한다.
etlConventions: Valid entries include a start date of a prescription, the date a prescription was filled, or the date on which a Drug administration was recorded. It is a valid ETL choice to use the date the drug was ordered as the DRUG_EXPOSURE_START_DATE.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This is not required, though it is in v6. If a source does not specify datetime the convention is to set the time to midnight (00:00:0000)

userGuidance: DRUG_EXPOSURE_END_DATE는 환자의 약물 노출이 종료된 날짜를 나타낸다.
etlConventions:
If this information is not explicitly available in the data, infer the end date using the following methods:

1. Start first with duration or days supply using the calculation drug start date + days supply -1 day. 2. Use quantity divided by daily dose that you may obtain from the sig or a source field (or assumed daily dose of 1) for solid, indivisibile, drug products. If quantity represents ingredient amount, quantity divided by daily dose * concentration (from drug_strength) drug concept id tells you the dose form. 3. If it is an administration record, set drug end date equal to drug start date. If the record is a written prescription then set end date to start date + 29. If the record is a mail-order prescription set end date to start date + 89. The end date must be equal to or greater than the start date. Ibuprofen 20mg/mL oral solution concept tells us this is oral solution. Calculate duration as quantity (200 example) * daily dose (5mL) /concentration (20mg/mL) 200*5/20 = 50 days. [Examples by dose form](https://ohdsi.github.io/CommonDataModel/drug_dose.html)

For detailed conventions for how to populate this field, please see the [THEMIS repository](https://ohdsi.github.io/Themis/tag_drug_exposure.html).

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This is not required, though it is in v6. If a source does not specify datetime the convention is to set the time to midnight (00:00:0000)

userGuidance: 이는 source 데이터에 약물 노출 종료일이 제공된 경우 해당 데이터에 나타난 그대로의 종료일이다
etlConventions: Put the end date or discontinuation date as it appears from the source data or leave blank if unavailable.

userGuidance: TYPE_CONCEPT_ID를 사용하여 작성된 처방, 조제된 처방, 약물 이력, 환자가 보고한 노출 등을 구분할 수 있다.
etlConventions: Choose the drug_type_concept_id that best represents the provenance of the record, for example whether it came from a record of a prescription written or physician administered drug. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: source에 표현된 그대로, 환자가 약물 복용을 중단한 이유이다. 이유에는 처방 요법 완료, 변경, 제거 등이 포함된다. 이 필드는 v6.0에서 폐기될 예정이다.
etlConventions: This information is often not populated in source data and it is a valid etl choice to leave it blank if the information does not exist.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 기록이 작성된 처방에서 비롯된 경우에만 채워지며, 처방 시점에서 의도한 리필(refill) 횟수를 나타내기 위한 것이다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions:
To find the dose form of a drug the RELATIONSHIP table can be used where the relationship_id is 'Has dose form'. If liquid, quantity stands for the total amount dispensed or ordered of ingredient in the units given by the drug_strength table. If the unit from the source data does not align with the unit in the DRUG_STRENGTH table the quantity should be converted to the correct unit given in DRUG_STRENGTH. For clinical drugs with fixed dose forms (tablets etc.) the quantity is the number of units/tablets/capsules prescribed or dispensed (can be partial, but then only 1/2 or 1/3, not 0.01). Clinical drugs with divisible dose forms (injections) the quantity is the amount of ingredient the patient got. For example, if the injection is 2mg/mL but the patient got 80mL then quantity is reported as 160.
Quantified clinical drugs with divisible dose forms (prefilled syringes), the quantity is the amount of ingredient similar to clinical drugs. Please see [how to calculate drug dose](https://ohdsi.github.io/CommonDataModel/drug_dose.html) for more information.

userGuidance: 원래의 처방 또는 조제 기록에 기록된 약물의 공급 일수(days supply)이다. 공급 일수는 실제 약물 사용 기간과 다를 수 있다(즉, 처방된 공급 일수 대 실제 노출 기간).
etlConventions:
The field should be left empty if the source data does not contain a verbatim days_supply, and should not be calculated from other fields.

Negative values are not allowed. If the source has negative days supply the record should be dropped as it is unknown if the patient actually took the drug. Several actions are possible: 1) record is not trustworthy and we remove the record entirely. 2) we trust the record and leave days_supply empty or 3) record needs to be combined with other record (e.g. reversal of prescription). High values (>365 days) should be investigated. If considered an error in the source data (e.g. typo), the value needs to be excluded to prevent creation of unrealistic long eras.

userGuidance: 이는 provider가 작성한 약물에 대한 그대로의 지시 사항이다.
etlConventions: Put the written out instructions for the drug as it is verbatim in the source, if available.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: The standard CONCEPT_ID that the ROUTE_SOURCE_VALUE maps to in the route domain.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: 약물 기록과 연관된 Provider, 예를 들어 처방을 작성한 provider 또는 약물을 투여한 provider이다.
etlConventions: The ETL may need to make a choice as to which PROVIDER_ID to put here. Based on what is available this may or may not be different than the provider associated with the overall VISIT_OCCURRENCE record, for example the ordering vs administering physician on an EHR record.

userGuidance: 약물이 처방, 투여 또는 조제된 Visit이다.
etlConventions: To populate this field drug exposures must be explicitly initiated in the visit.

userGuidance: 약물 노출이 발생한 VISIT_DETAIL 기록이다. 예를 들어, 약물 투여 시점에 환자가 ICU에 있었다면 VISIT_OCCURRENCE 기록은 전체 입원 기간을 반영하고 VISIT_DETAIL 기록은 해당 입원 중 ICU 체류를 반영한다.
etlConventions: Same rules apply as for the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 발생한 약물 노출을 나타내는 source 데이터의 그대로의 값을 담는다. 예를 들어, 이는 NDC 또는 Gemscript 코드일 수 있다.
etlConventions: This code is mapped to a Standard Drug Concept in the Standardized Vocabularies and the original code is stored here for reference.

userGuidance: 이는 drug source value를 나타내는 개념이며 반드시 표준 개념이 아닐 수도 있다. 이 필드는 OHDSI 커뮤니티 전반에서 사용되는 Standard Concept를 포함하도록 요구되지 않기 때문에 분석에서의 사용을 권장하지 않으며, 특정 분석 사용 사례에 필요한 Drug의 source 세부 정보를 Standard Concept가 적절히 나타내지 못하는 경우에만 사용해야 한다. 네트워크 전반에서 일관성을 가질 수 있는 표준화된 분석을 위해서는 대신 DRUG_CONCEPT_ID 사용을 고려한다.
etlConventions: If the DRUG_SOURCE_VALUE is coded in the source data using an OMOP supported vocabulary put the concept id representing the source value here.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 약물 투여 경로를 나타내는 source 데이터의 그대로의 값을 담는다.
etlConventions: This information may be called something different in the source data but the field is meant to contain a value indicating when and how a drug was given to a patient. This source value is mapped to a standard concept which is stored in the ROUTE_CONCEPT_ID field.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 투여된 약물의 용량 단위를 나타내는 source 데이터의 그대로의 값을 담는다.
etlConventions: This information may be called something different in the source data but the field is meant to contain a value indicating the unit of dosage of drug given to the patient. This is an older column and will be deprecated in an upcoming version.

userGuidance: 한 person에 대한 procedure 기록에 부여된 고유 키이다. 동일한 visit 중에 발생한 중복 procedure가 어떻게 처리되었는지는 ETL을 참조한다.
etlConventions: Each instance of a procedure occurrence in the source data should be assigned this unique key. In some cases, a person can have multiple records of the same procedure within the same visit. It is valid to keep these duplicates and assign them individual, unique, PROCEDURE_OCCURRENCE_IDs, though it is up to the ETL how they should be handled.

userGuidance: procedure가 기록된 PERSON의 PERSON_ID이다. 이는 시스템에서 생성된 코드일 수 있다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: PROCEDURE_CONCEPT_ID 필드는 분석에서 우선적으로 사용하도록 권장되며, 네트워크 연구에서는 반드시 사용해야 한다. 이는 procedure를 나타내는 source value로부터 매핑된 표준 개념이다
etlConventions: The CONCEPT_ID that the PROCEDURE_SOURCE_VALUE maps to. Only records whose source values map to standard concepts with a domain of "Procedure" should go in this table. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Procedure&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: 이 날짜를 사용하여 procedure가 발생한 날짜를 판단한다.
etlConventions: If a procedure lasts more than a day, then it should be recorded as a separate record for each day the procedure occurred, this logic is in lieu of the procedure_end_date, which will be added in a future version of the CDM.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This is not required, though it is in v6. If a source does not specify datetime the convention is to set the time to midnight (00:00:0000)

userGuidance: 이 필드는 해당 절차(Procedure) 기록이 EHR 시스템, 보험 청구, 레지스트리 또는 기타 출처 중 어디에서 유래했는지와 같이 Procedure 기록의 출처(provenance)를 파악하는 데 사용할 수 있다.
etlConventions: Choose the PROCEDURE_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID that best represents the provenance of the record, for example whether it came from an EHR record or billing claim. If a procedure is recorded as an EHR encounter, the PROCEDURE_TYPE_CONCEPT would be 'EHR encounter record'. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: modifier는 해당 절차에 대한 추가 정보를 제공하기 위한 것이나, 현재로서는 해당 vocabulary가 검토 중이다.
etlConventions: It is up to the ETL to choose how to map modifiers if they exist in source data. These concepts are typically distinguished by 'Modifier' concept classes (e.g., 'CPT4 Modifier' as part of the 'CPT4' vocabulary). If there is more than one modifier on a record, one should be chosen that pertains to the procedure rather than provider. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?conceptClass=CPT4+Modifier&conceptClass=HCPCS+Modifier&vocabulary=CPT4&vocabulary=HCPCS&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=).

userGuidance: quantity 값이 생략된 경우, 단일 절차로 간주한다.
etlConventions: If a Procedure has a quantity of '0' in the source, this should default to '1' in the ETL. If there is a record in the source it can be assumed the exposure occurred at least once

userGuidance: 해당 절차 기록과 연관된 provider, 예를 들어 해당 Procedure를 수행한 provider이다.
etlConventions: The ETL may need to make a choice as to which PROVIDER_ID to put here. Based on what is available this may or may not be different than the provider associated with the overall VISIT_OCCURRENCE record, for example the admitting vs attending physician on an EHR record.

userGuidance: 해당 절차가 발생한 visit이다.
etlConventions: Depending on the structure of the source data, this may have to be determined based on dates. If a PROCEDURE_DATE occurs within the start and end date of a Visit it is a valid ETL choice to choose the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID from the Visit that subsumes it, even if not explicitly stated in the data. While not required, an attempt should be made to locate the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID of the PROCEDURE_OCCURRENCE record.

userGuidance: 해당 Procedure가 발생한 VISIT_DETAIL 기록이다. 예를 들어, Procedure 시점에 Person이 ICU에 있었다면 VISIT_OCCURRENCE 기록은 전체 입원 기간을 반영하고 VISIT_DETAIL 기록은 해당 입원 visit 중 ICU 체류 기간을 반영한다.
etlConventions: Same rules apply as for the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 발생한 절차를 나타내는 원천 데이터의 원문 그대로의 값을 담는다. 예를 들어, CPT4 또는 OPCS4 코드일 수 있다.
etlConventions: Use this value to look up the source concept id and then map the source concept id to a standard concept id.

userGuidance: 이는 procedure source value를 나타내는 concept이며 반드시 standard일 필요는 없다. 이 필드는 OHDSI 커뮤니티 전반에서 사용되는 Standard Concept를 포함할 것이 요구되지 않으므로 분석에서의 사용이 권장되지 않으며, 특정 분석 활용 사례에 필요한 Procedure의 원천 세부 정보를 Standard Concept가 충분히 표현하지 못하는 경우에만 사용해야 한다. 네트워크 전반에서 일관성을 가질 수 있는 표준화된 분석을 가능하게 하려면 대신 PROCEDURE_CONCEPT_ID 사용을 고려한다.
etlConventions: If the PROCEDURE_SOURCE_VALUE is coded in the source data using an OMOP supported vocabulary put the concept id representing the source value here.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 발생한 절차에 대한 modifier 코드를 나타내는 원천 데이터의 원문 그대로의 값을 담는다.
etlConventions: The value stored here is mapped to a MODIFIER_CONCEPT_ID.

userGuidance: 사람이 외래 물리적 객체 또는 기구에 노출된 것을 기록하는 데 부여된 고유 키이다.
etlConventions: Each instance of an exposure to a foreign object or device present in the source data should be assigned this unique key.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: DEVICE_CONCEPT_ID 필드는 분석에서 주요 사용이 권장되며, 네트워크 연구에서는 반드시 사용해야 한다. 이는 사람이 노출된 외래 물체 또는 기구를 나타내는 source concept id로부터 매핑된 standard concept이다.
etlConventions: The CONCEPT_ID that the DEVICE_SOURCE_VALUE maps to.

userGuidance: 이 날짜를 사용하여 device 기록의 시작일을 파악한다.
etlConventions: Valid entries include a start date of a procedure to implant a device, the date of a prescription for a device, or the date of device administration.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This is not required, though it is in v6. If a source does not specify datetime the convention is to set the time to midnight (00:00:0000)

userGuidance: DEVICE_EXPOSURE_END_DATE는 주어진 경우, 환자에 대한 device 노출이 종료된 날을 나타낸다.
etlConventions: Put the end date or discontinuation date as it appears from the source data or leave blank if unavailable.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If a source does not specify datetime the convention is to set the time to midnight (00:00:0000)

userGuidance: TYPE_CONCEPT_ID를 사용하여 해당 기록이 administrative claims에서 온 것인지 EHR에서 온 것인지와 같이 기록의 출처(provenance)를 나타낼 수 있다.
etlConventions: Choose the drug_type_concept_id that best represents the provenance of the record, for example whether it came from a record of a prescription written or physician administered drug. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: 이는 주어진 경우, FDA가 규제하는 device에 대한 Unique Device Identification 번호이다.
etlConventions: For medical devices that are regulated by the FDA, a Unique Device Identification (UDI) is provided if available in the data source and is recorded in the UNIQUE_DEVICE_ID field.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If there is a record of device exposure in the source but no quantity value, then set to 1.

userGuidance: device 기록과 연관된 Provider, 예를 들어 처방을 작성한 provider 또는 device를 이식한 provider이다.
etlConventions: The ETL may need to make a choice as to which PROVIDER_ID to put here. Based on what is available this may or may not be different than the provider associated with the overall VISIT_OCCURRENCE record.

userGuidance: device가 처방되거나 제공된 Visit이다.
etlConventions: To populate this field device exposures must be explicitly initiated in the visit.

userGuidance: device가 처방되거나 제공된 Visit Detail이다.
etlConventions: To populate this field device exposures must be explicitly initiated in the visit detail record.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 발생한 device 노출을 나타내는 원천 데이터의 원문 그대로의 값을 담는다. 예를 들어, NDC 또는 Gemscript 코드일 수 있다.
etlConventions: This code is mapped to a Standard Device Concept in the Standardized Vocabularies and the original code is stored here for reference.

userGuidance: 이는 device source value를 나타내는 concept이며 반드시 standard일 필요는 없다. 이 필드는 OHDSI 커뮤니티 전반에서 사용되는 Standard Concept를 포함할 것이 요구되지 않으므로 분석에서의 사용이 권장되지 않으며, 특정 분석 활용 사례에 필요한 Device의 원천 세부 정보를 Standard Concept가 충분히 표현하지 못하는 경우에만 사용해야 한다. 네트워크 전반에서 일관성을 가질 수 있는 표준화된 분석을 가능하게 하려면 대신 DEVICE_CONCEPT_ID 사용을 고려한다.
etlConventions: If the DEVICE_SOURCE_VALUE is coded in the source data using an OMOP supported vocabulary put the concept id representing the source value here.

userGuidance: Person에 대한 Measurement 레코드에 부여된 고유 키. 동일한 Visit 중 발생한 중복 Measurement를 어떻게 처리했는지는 ETL을 참조한다.
etlConventions: Each instance of a measurement present in the source data should be assigned this unique key. In some cases, a person can have multiple records of the same measurement within the same visit. It is valid to keep these duplicates and assign them individual, unique, MEASUREMENT_IDs, though it is up to the ETL how they should be handled.

userGuidance: Measurement가 기록된 Person의 PERSON_ID. 시스템에서 생성된 코드일 수 있다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: MEASUREMENT_CONCEPT_ID 필드는 분석에서 우선적으로 사용하도록 권장되며, 네트워크 연구에서는 반드시 사용해야 한다. 이는 측정값을 나타내는 source value로부터 매핑된 standard concept이다.
etlConventions: The CONCEPT_ID that the MEASUREMENT_SOURCE_VALUE maps to. Only records whose source values map to concepts with a domain of ÒMeasurementÓ should go in this table.

userGuidance: 측정 날짜를 확인하려면 이 날짜를 사용한다.
etlConventions: If there are multiple dates in the source data associated with a record such as order_date, draw_date, and result_date, choose the one that is closest to the date the sample was drawn from the patient.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This is not required, though it is in v6. If a source does not specify datetime the convention is to set the time to midnight (00:00:0000)

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: This is present for backwards compatibility and will be deprecated in an upcoming version.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 측정값이 EHR 시스템, 보험 청구, 레지스트리 또는 기타 출처에서 왔는지 등 Measurement 레코드의 출처(provenance)를 확인하는 데 사용할 수 있다.
etlConventions: Choose the MEASUREMENT_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID that best represents the provenance of the record, for example whether it came from an EHR record or billing claim. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: '='를 나타내는 Concept [4172703](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms/4172703)의 의미는 OPERATOR_CONCEPT_ID 값을 생략한 것과 동일하다. 이 필드의 사용은 드물기 때문에, 분석을 설계할 때 이 필드의 내용이 =와 다른 값을 가지는지 검사하는 것을 잊지 않는 것이 중요하다.
etlConventions: Operators are <, <=, =, >=, > and these concepts belong to the 'Meas Value Operator' domain. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Meas+Value+Operator&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). Leave it NULL if there's an exact numeric value given (instead of putting '=') or there's no numeric value at all.

userGuidance: 이는 Measurement 결과의 숫자 값이며, 사용 가능한 경우에 한한다. 혈압과 같은 측정값은 구성 요소별로 분할된다는 점에 유의한다. 즉, 수축기에 대한 레코드 하나, 이완기에 대한 레코드 하나로 나뉜다.
etlConventions: [Convention for negative values](https://ohdsi.github.io/Themis/negative_value_as_number.html)

userGuidance: 원시 데이터가 측정값에 대해 범주형 결과를 제공하는 경우 해당 값을 수집하여 'Meas Value' 도메인의 standard concept에 매핑한다.
etlConventions: If there is no categorial result in the source data, set VALUE_AS_CONCEPT_ID to NULL, if there is a categorial result in a source data but without mapping, set VALUE_AS_CONCEPT_ID to 0, else map to a CONCEPT_ID.

userGuidance: 현재 Hemoglobin A1C와 같은 개별 측정값에 대해 규정된 단위는 없으며, 이는 이러한 측정값을 백분율로 표현하는 것이 의무가 아님을 의미한다. UNIT_SOURCE_VALUES는 source data에 제공된 단위를 가장 정확하게 반영하는 Unit 도메인 내 Standard Concept에 연결되어야 한다.
etlConventions: If the source data does not include units, set UNIT_CONCEPT_ID to NULL. If units are provided but not mapped, set UNIT_CONCEPT_ID to 0. Otherwise, map the units to a CONCEPT_ID. Remember that units are case-sensitive in vocabulary.

userGuidance: 범위는 VALUE_AS_NUMBER와 동일한 단위를 가진다. 이러한 범위는 source에서 제공되며, 제공되지 않은 경우 NULL로 유지되어야 한다.
etlConventions: If reference ranges for upper and lower limit of normal as provided (typically by a laboratory) these are stored in the RANGE_HIGH and RANGE_LOW fields. This should be set to NULL if not provided.

userGuidance: 범위는 VALUE_AS_NUMBER와 동일한 단위를 가진다. 이러한 범위는 source에서 제공되며, 제공되지 않은 경우 NULL로 유지되어야 한다.
etlConventions: If reference ranges for upper and lower limit of normal as provided (typically by a laboratory) these are stored in the RANGE_HIGH and RANGE_LOW fields. This should be set to NULL if not provided.

userGuidance: 측정 레코드와 연관된 provider, 예를 들어 검사를 지시한 provider 또는 결과를 기록한 provider이다.
etlConventions: The ETL may need to make a choice as to which PROVIDER_ID to put here. Based on what is available this may or may not be different than the provider associated with the overall VISIT_OCCURRENCE record. For example the admitting vs attending physician on an EHR record.

userGuidance: Measurement가 발생한 visit이다.
etlConventions: Depending on the structure of the source data, this may have to be determined based on dates. If a MEASUREMENT_DATE occurs within the start and end date of a Visit it is a valid ETL choice to choose the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID from the visit that subsumes it, even if not explicitly stated in the data. While not required, an attempt should be made to locate the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID of the measurement record. If a measurement is related to a visit explicitly in the source data, it is possible that the result date of the Measurement falls outside of the bounds of the Visit dates.

userGuidance: Measurement가 발생한 VISIT_DETAIL 레코드이다. 예를 들어 Person이 측정 당시 ICU에 있었다면 VISIT_OCCURRENCE 레코드는 전체 입원 기간을 반영하고, VISIT_DETAIL 레코드는 해당 입원 visit 중 ICU 체류를 반영한다.
etlConventions: Same rules apply as for the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 발생한 측정값을 나타내는, source data의 정확한 값을 담는다.
etlConventions: This value corresponds to a standardized CONCEPT_ID found in MEASUREMENT_CONCEPT_ID and in the 'Measurement' domain within the Standardized Vocabularies. The original code is retained here for reference purposes.

userGuidance: 이는 MEASUREMENT_SOURCE_VALUE를 나타내는 concept이며 반드시 standard일 필요는 없다. 이 필드는 OHDSI 커뮤니티 전반에서 사용되는 Standard Concept을 포함하도록 요구되지 않으므로 분석에서의 사용을 권장하지 않으며, 특정 분석 사용 사례에 필요한 Measurement의 source 세부 정보를 Standard Concept이 충분히 나타내지 못하는 경우에만 사용해야 한다. 네트워크 전반에서 일관성을 유지할 수 있는 표준화된 분석을 가능하게 하려면 대신 MEASUREMENT_CONCEPT_ID를 사용하는 것을 고려한다.
etlConventions: If the MEASUREMENT_SOURCE_VALUE is coded in the source data using a vocabulary supported by OMOP Standardized Vocabularies, insert the CONCEPT_ID representing the source value here.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 사용된 측정 단위를 나타내는, source data의 정확한 값을 담는다.
etlConventions: This value corresponds to a standardized CONCEPT_ID found in UNIT_CONCEPT_ID and in the 'Unit' domain within the Standardized Vocabularies. The original code is retained here for reference purposes.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 source data로부터의 Measurement 결과 값을 그대로(verbatim) 담는다.
etlConventions: If both a continuous and categorical result are given in the source data such that both VALUE_AS_NUMBER and VALUE_AS_CONCEPT_ID are both included, store the verbatim value that was mapped to VALUE_AS_CONCEPT_ID here.

userGuidance: Person에 대한 Observation 레코드에 부여된 고유 키. 동일한 Visit 중 발생한 중복 Observation을 어떻게 처리했는지는 ETL을 참조한다.
etlConventions: Each instance of an observation present in the source data should be assigned this unique key.

userGuidance: Observation이 기록된 Person의 PERSON_ID. 시스템에서 생성된 코드일 수 있다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: OBSERVATION_CONCEPT_ID 필드는 분석에서 기본적으로 사용하도록 권장되며, 네트워크 연구에서는 반드시 사용해야 한다.
etlConventions: The CONCEPT_ID that the OBSERVATION_SOURCE_CONCEPT_ID maps to. There is no specified domain that the Concepts in this table must adhere to. The only rule is that records with Concepts in the Condition, Procedure, Drug, Measurement, or Device domains MUST go to the corresponding table.

userGuidance: Observation을 획득한 날짜다. Observation이 무엇을 나타내는지에 따라 이는 검사일, 설문조사일, 또는 환자의 가족력을 수집한 날짜가 될 수 있다.
etlConventions: For some observations the ETL may need to make a choice as to which date to choose.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: If no time is given set to midnight (00:00:00).

userGuidance: 이 필드는 Observation 레코드의 출처를 판별하는 데 사용할 수 있으며, 예를 들어 해당 측정값이 EHR 시스템, 보험 청구, 레지스트리 또는 기타 출처에서 비롯되었는지를 나타낸다.
etlConventions: Choose the OBSERVATION_TYPE_CONCEPT_ID that best represents the provenance of the record, for example whether it came from an EHR record or billing claim. [Accepted Concepts](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms?domain=Type+Concept&standardConcept=Standard&page=1&pageSize=15&query=). A more detailed explanation of each Type Concept can be found on the [vocabulary wiki](https://github.com/OHDSI/Vocabulary-v5.0/wiki/Vocab.-TYPE_CONCEPT).

userGuidance: 이는 해당되고 가용한 경우 Observation 결과의 수치 값이다. 모든 Observation이 수치 결과를 가질 것으로 기대되지는 않으며, 오히려 이 필드는 값이 존재할 경우 이를 담기 위해 존재한다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: 이는 해당되고 가용한 경우 Observation 결과의 범주형 값이다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: Observation 테이블로 향하는 일부 레코드는 하나의 소스 코드에 두 가지 임상 개념이 표현되어 있을 수 있다. 이는 예를 들어 어떤 Condition의 가족력을 기술하는 ICD10 코드에서 흔하다. OMOP에서는 Vocabulary가 이 두 임상 개념을 두 개의 코드로 분리하는데, 하나는 OBSERVATION_CONCEPT_ID가 되고 다른 하나는 VALUE_AS_CONCEPT_ID가 된다. Observation 테이블을 사용할 때는 이러한 가능성을 염두에 두고 관련 정보를 위해 VALUE_AS_CONCEPT_ID 필드를 살펴보는 것이 중요하다.
etlConventions: Note that the value of VALUE_AS_CONCEPT_ID may be provided through mapping from a source Concept which contains the content of the Observation. In those situations, the CONCEPT_RELATIONSHIP table in addition to the 'Maps to' record contains a second record with the relationship_id set to 'Maps to value'. For example, ICD10 [Z82.4](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms/45581076) 'Family history of ischaemic heart disease and other diseases of the circulatory system' has a 'Maps to' relationship to [4167217](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms/4167217) 'Family history of clinical finding' as well as a 'Maps to value' record to [134057](https://athena.ohdsi.org/search-terms/terms/134057) 'Disorder of cardiovascular system'. If there's no categorial result in a source_data, set value_as_concept_id to NULL, if there is a categorial result in a source_data but without mapping, set value_as_concept_id to 0.

userGuidance: 이 필드는 정도, 중증도, 약물-약물 상호작용 경고 등 임상 사실을 추가로 명시하는 모든 속성을 담는다.
etlConventions: Use your best judgement as to what Concepts to use here and if they are necessary to accurately represent the clinical record. There is no restriction on the domain of these Concepts, they just need to be Standard.

userGuidance: 현재 개별 observation concept에 대해 권장되는 단위는 없다. UNIT_SOURCE_VALUE는 소스 데이터에 주어진 단위를 가장 잘 나타내는 Unit 도메인의 Standard Concept으로 매핑해야 한다.
etlConventions: There is no standardization requirement for units associated with OBSERVATION_CONCEPT_IDs, however, it is the responsibility of the ETL to choose the most plausible unit. If the source unit is NULL (applicable to cases when there's no numerical value or when it doesn't require a unit), keep unit_concept_id NULL as well. If there's no mapping of a source unit, populate unit_concept_id with 0.

userGuidance: observation 레코드와 연관된 provider로, 예를 들어 검사를 지시한 provider 또는 결과를 기록한 provider다.
etlConventions: The ETL may need to make a choice as to which PROVIDER_ID to put here. Based on what is available this may or may not be different than the provider associated with the overall VISIT_OCCURRENCE record. For example the admitting vs attending physician on an EHR record.

userGuidance: Observation이 발생한 visit이다.
etlConventions: Depending on the structure of the source data, this may have to be determined based on dates. If an OBSERVATION_DATE occurs within the start and end date of a Visit it is a valid ETL choice to choose the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID from the visit that subsumes it, even if not explicitly stated in the data. While not required, an attempt should be made to locate the VISIT_OCCURRENCE_ID of the observation record. If an observation is related to a visit explicitly in the source data, it is possible that the result date of the Observation falls outside of the bounds of the Visit dates.

etlConventions:
Term_exists is defined as a flag that indicates if the patient actually has or had the condition. Any of the following modifiers would make Term_exists false:
Negation = true
Subject = [anything other than the patient]
Conditional = true/li>
Rule_out = true
Uncertain = very low certainty or any lower certainties
A complete lack of modifiers would make Term_exists true.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions:
Term_temporal is to indicate if a condition is present or just in the past. The following would be past:

- History = true - Concept_date = anything before the time of the report

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions:
For the modifiers that are there, they would have to have these values:

- Negation = false - Subject = patient - Conditional = false - Rule_out = false - Uncertain = true or high or moderate or even low (could argue about low). Term_modifiers will concatenate all modifiers for different types of entities (conditions, drugs, labs etc) into one string. Lab values will be saved as one of the modifiers.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: The Drug Era Start Date is the start date of the first Drug Exposure for a given ingredient, with at least 31 days since the previous exposure.

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions:
The Drug Era End Date is the end date of the last Drug Exposure. The End Date of each Drug Exposure is either taken from the field drug_exposure_end_date or, as it is typically not available, inferred using the following rules:
For pharmacy prescription data, the date when the drug was dispensed plus the number of days of supply are used to extrapolate the End Date for the Drug Exposure. Depending on the country-specific healthcare system, this supply information is either explicitly provided in the day_supply field or inferred from package size or similar information.
For Procedure Drugs, usually the drug is administered on a single date (i.e., the administration date).
A standard Persistence Window of 30 days (gap, slack) is permitted between two subsequent such extrapolated DRUG_EXPOSURE records to be considered to be merged into a single Drug Era.

userGuidance: DRUG_ERA 행에 포함된 그룹화된 DRUG_EXPOSURE 레코드의 개수이다.
etlConventions: NA

userGuidance: NA
etlConventions: The Gap Days determine how many total drug-free days are observed between all Drug Exposure events that contribute to a DRUG_ERA record. It is assumed that the drugs are "not stockpiled" by the patient, i.e. that if a new drug prescription or refill is observed (a new DRUG_EXPOSURE record is written), the remaining supply from the previous events is abandoned.   The difference between Persistence Window and Gap Days is that the former is the maximum drug-free time allowed between two subsequent DRUG_EXPOSURE records, while the latter is the sum of actual drug-free days for the given Drug Era under the above assumption of non-stockpiling.
